channel.title: My Tech Blog
channel.description: Recent posts from My Tech Blog

item.title: How to Run an Effective and Inclusive Hybrid Meeting
item.description: Ensure every voice is heard during your hybrid meetings with these facilitation tips for inclusive and productive collaboration.

item.title: How to succeed as the leader of a distributed team?
item.description: Manage your remote and distributed teams more effectively with these leadership strategies focused on communication and trust.

item.title: 5 Desk Yoga Poses to Reset Your Working Day
item.description: Learn five easy yoga poses you can do at your desk to relieve physical tension and reset your mind during a busy workday.

item.title: The Rise of Agentic AI: How Autonomous Workflows are Redefining Productivity
item.description: In recent months, the focus of artificial intelligence has shifted dramatically from passive chat systems to active, autonomous agents. These systems,...

item.title: The Whereby Meetings Manifesto: A Simple Framework for Better Meetings Every Time
item.description: Adopt the Whereby Meetings Manifesto to reclaim your focus time and make your team's meetings more efficient and purposeful.

item.title: How Wellnite is Powering a Mental Health Revolution with Whereby
item.description: See how Wellnite uses Whereby's embedded video API to provide accessible mental health care to thousands of patients.

item.title: Whereby Tips, Shortcuts and Features for Even Better Meetings
item.description: Level up your video conferencing skills with our guide to Whereby's best hidden features and time-saving keyboard shortcuts.

item.title: Time to kill the '1 remote—all remote' rule!
item.description: Discover why the traditional hybrid meeting rule is failing and how to create a more equitable experience for both in-office and remote workers.
